title: Recount of ballots or contest of elections
doc_html:
§591. Recount of ballots or contest of elections

            Recount of ballots or contest of elections shall be conducted in accordance with the Louisiana Election Code.

            Acts 1987, No. 696, §1; Acts 2018, No. 334, §1, eff. May 15, 2018.
doc_text:
§591.  Recount of ballots or contest of elections
Recount of ballots or contest of elections shall be conducted in accordance with the
Louisiana Election Code.
Acts 1987, No. 696, §1; Acts 2018, No. 334, §1, eff. May 15, 2018.
